assertions.assertion: The web app uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", identityServer.GetEndpoint("https")) or equivalent using GetEndpoint
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows this exact pattern.

assertions.assertion: The web app uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__ClientId", ...) with a client ID value
The web app passes at least one scope via .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Scopes__0", ...) using double-underscore array indexing
The API uses .WithEnvironment("Authentication__Authority", ...) with GetEndpoint for the authority URL
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows API with Authentication__Authority via GetEndpoint.

assertions.assertion: The code does NOT set IssuerUri unless explicitly needed
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md warns against setting IssuerUri unnecessarily.
